name: Web Accessibility Fundamentals
description: Learn to identify, evaluate, and address common web accessibility barriers so that digital content works for everyone, including people who use assistive technology.
learningObjectives: Identify common accessibility barriers on web pages
Use browser developer tools to run basic accessibility audits
Propose concrete fixes for the accessibility issues you find

name: Writing an Accessibility Audit Report
description: Produce a professional accessibility audit report for a real website, combining technical evaluation with clear, actionable recommendations.
learningObjectives: Select an appropriate website and scope an accessibility audit
Document accessibility issues with evidence and WCAG references
Write a complete accessibility audit report with prioritized recommendations
